summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of HSBC Germany MX Transaction Platform. All 6 document templates working perfectly with correct HSBC branding, dark theme Status Statement, and professional document formats.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with transaction statistics and charts
Transactions list page displays all transactions correctly
Navigation to Transaction Detail page via View button
Settlement Letter tab - formal letter format with checkmarks and transaction references
Confirmation Copy tab - SWIFT Payment Confirmation with proper structure
Status Statement tab - dark theme with red section headers and green checkmarks
MT202 COV tab - includes barcode, HSBC Germany branding, QR code, SWIFT format
PACS.008 tab - loads successfully with proper document structure
Debit Note tab - loads successfully with proper document format
HSBC Germany branding present in all document templates
Print and Export PDF buttons functional
No error messages or broken functionality found
